title: Photocleavable Surfactant-Enabled Extracellular Matrix Proteomics.
author: Knott SJ Brown KA Josyer H Carr A Inman D Jin S Friedl A Ponik SM Ge Y
content: S-EPMC7961849 PMC7961849 Photocleavable Surfactant-Enabled Extracellular Matrix Proteomics. The extracellular matrix (ECM) provides an architectural meshwork that surrounds and supports cells.
